name: OpenBao
description: OpenBao — open source fork of HashiCorp Vault maintained by the Linux Foundation for secrets management.

seo.title: OpenBao — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: OpenBao: OpenBao — open source fork of HashiCorp Vault maintained by the Linux Foundation for secrets management.

when_to_use: Dynamic secrets generation for database credentials in K8s
PKI secrets engine for automated TLS certificate rotation
Kubernetes secrets injection via OpenBao agent sidecar
Transit encryption API for application-layer data encryption
Open-source HashiCorp Vault replacement under Linux Foundation

pros: Truly open-source fork of Vault under LF
cons: Feature drift from Vault likely over time
review.verdict: The right pick if the BSL switch ruined Vault for you; expect a rougher ride than upstream for now.
review.best_for: Teams that want Vault functionality under a permissive license.
review.not_for: Shops that rely on Vault Enterprise features or HCP.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
